description: Declarative source for the ai_studio refactor tree. The HTML map is only a renderer; rebuild it with node tools/architecture_map/build_architecture_map.mjs.

root.title: ai_studio/
root.subtitle: refactor root
root.description: Clean refactor tree. Start with Core Harness only; promote modules from Not Refactored after review, cleanup, owner assignment, and compatibility checks.

children.title: ai_studio/README.md
children.description: AI Studio root index: describes available capabilities, task routing, migration rules, map ownership, and where to go for each kind of work.
children.role: AI Studio root capability index and router

children.title: Core Harness
children.subtitle: ai_studio/core_harness
children.description: Harness, agent-facing contract, AGENTS.md, root compatibility surfaces, and the smallest public entry points needed to start work.
Repo-level harness contract loaded by agents: repository role, AI Studio direction, current-game routing, hard invariants, and context routes.
Compatibility pointer for Claude-facing harnesses; should stay generated or thin and route back to AGENTS.md.
Current-game routing file. Keeps active game context out of AGENTS.md and points to game design docs, task state, and game folder when a game is active.

children.title: Workflow
children.subtitle: task execution order
children.description: Core Harness workflow group: local process for context loading, work loop, validation handoff, and delegation checkpoint.
children.role: agent task workflow inside the harness

children.description: Canonical Workflow contract: context policy, lead-agent work loop, validation handoff, and delegation checkpoint.

children.title: Orchestration
children.subtitle: early subagent split
children.description: Simple early-split rule for broad read-heavy work. Owns the public orchestration CLI route and keeps subagent use lightweight with Task / Scope / Return / Stop packets.
children.role: subagent delegation trigger and packet shape

children.description: Short orchestration contract: when to split work, the simple packet format, lead responsibility, and current compatibility tooling.
Public Core Harness orchestration CLI route. Owns command dispatch for subagent packet templates/checks and orchestration bootstrap/check.
Regression tests for the orchestration CLI route, command surface, delegation, and taskboard-only command rejection.
Tool layout contract: public facades, domain helpers, and cleanup or validation routing.
Mechanical guard for hot docs and skill entrypoint size; keeps always-loaded Core context small.
children.role: hot docs and skill budget guard

children.description: Mechanical guard for stale local references, missing files, and retired commands in Markdown.
Validation orchestrator behind tools/pipeline_validate.mjs modes; collects docs, skills, taskboard, export, and product checks.
Gate taxonomy and validation reference; Core should route to it instead of duplicating the rules.
Cross-harness sync entry point; keeps generated skills and hook surfaces aligned.
Generates Claude-facing skill pointers from canonical Codex skills.
Generates Codex and Claude hook config from shared hook sources.
Portable export and template contract; explains the reusable pipeline base and game starter copy model.
Move-out candidate from Core; owns profiling, reuse, prototype closeout, and export guidance.
children.role: profiling/reuse reference belongs outside Core after review

children.title: Taskboard
children.subtitle: tasks/ + ai_studio/taskboard
children.description: Durable project work state: tasks, epics, live status, context digest, and task-store validation.
Taskboard contract for task files, statuses, task lifecycle, durable context, and task CLI usage.
Live project status and short current-state digest. It is state, not harness policy.
Detailed task-store reference for fields, lifecycle, and maintenance rules.
Public Taskboard CLI for listing, context digest, task create/update, and task-store validation.
Taskboard implementation library: parsing, validation, context digest, and task mutation. Some orchestration validation helpers still need deeper extraction.
Optional local browser UI server for viewing the taskboard.
Taskboard regression tests for parsing, commands, context, validation, and task lifecycle behavior.

children.title: Architecture & Migration
children.subtitle: map, generator, and refactor control plane
children.description: Self-map for this AI Studio refactor tree: generated HTML, full inventory, source report, and the generator that defines nodes, hierarchy, and ownership.

children.title: tree.json
children.description: Declarative source for the working ai_studio tree: hierarchy, node ids, manual labels, roles, tags, and explicit child order.
children.role: declarative source of the ai_studio tree

children.title: architecture-map.html
children.description: Generated renderer for the working Core-first refactor map. Do not edit this file by hand; rebuild it from tree.json.
children.role: generated renderer for the working Core-first map

children.title: architecture-map-full.html
children.description: Generated full inventory graph of current Markdown sources, tools, and inferred links. Use it as reference material.

children.title: architecture-map.md
children.description: Human-readable contract for what the architecture map means, where the source files live, and how to use the map for refactoring.
children.role: human-readable map contract and architecture report

children.title: build_architecture_map.mjs
children.description: Generator for the working map and full inventory reports. It renders tree.json and should not become the source of the visible tree semantics.

children.title: Not Refactored
children.subtitle: current scattered pipeline
children.description: Everything that exists today but has not yet been reviewed, cleaned, assigned an owner, and moved into the main ai_studio tree.
